data.name: sign_in_direct
data.value: Sign in using login and password

data.name: landing_subtitle
data.value: The messenger of VK social network

data.name: landing_auth_in_progress
data.value: Please allow access to your account.

data.name: da_2fa_app
data.value: Enter the code provided by the code-generating app:

data.name: da_2fa_sms
data.value: Enter the code sent via SMS to {0}:

data.name: not_implemented_desc
data.value: This feature will coming in the next beta-versions of Laney.

data.name: err_network_general
data.value: Please check your internet connection and try again.

data.name: err_network_shinaprovod
data.value: A server error occurred. Please try again later.

data.name: log_out_confirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to log out?

data.name: chatview_placeholder
data.value: Select a chat or create a new one

data.name: chat_kicked
data.value: You were removed from the chat

data.name: offline_long_ago_f
data.value: Last seen a long time ago

data.name: offline_long_ago_m
data.value: Last seen a long time ago

data.name: msg_action_rename_m
data.value: changed the group chat name to

data.name: msg_action_rename_f
data.value: changed the group chat name to

data.name: pp_attachments_photo
data.value: Photos from the chat will be displayed here

data.name: pp_attachments_video
data.value: Videos from the chat will be displayed here

data.name: pp_attachments_audio
data.value: Music from the chat will be displayed here

data.name: pp_attachments_doc
data.value: Files from the chat will be displayed here

data.name: pp_attachments_share
data.value: Links from the chat will be displayed here

data.name: stp_expired
data.value: The story could have been viewed within 24 hours after being created

data.name: settings_search_empty_text
data.value: Try another word. Settings are not telepaths.

data.name: settings_autostart_enabled_desc
data.value: Adds the client to the current user's system autostart

data.name: settings_autostart_minimized_desc
data.value: Opens the window minimized instead of jumping into your face

data.name: settings_notifications_delivery_desc
data.value: Laney custom notifications, system notifications, or both at once

data.name: settings_notifications_position_desc
data.value: Corner where the custom notification stack appears

data.name: settings_notifications_stack_limit_desc
data.value: How many custom notifications can stay on screen at once

data.name: settings_notifications_timeout_desc
data.value: How many seconds before a custom notification disappears

data.name: settings_notifications_fast_actions_desc
data.value: Open, mark read, and mute buttons inside the notification

data.name: settings_notifications_show_avatars_desc
data.value: Sender avatar in the custom notification

data.name: settings_notifications_show_images_desc
data.value: Attachment previews in the custom notification

data.name: settings_api_domain_desc
data.value: VK API host without a path, for example api.vk.me

data.name: settings_api_version_desc
data.value: Version sent in the v parameter

data.name: settings_api_reset_desc
data.value: Restore the API domain and version bundled with the client

data.name: cm_local_quiet_subtitle
data.value: Mute toast and sound locally for a while; VK is not changed

data.name: cm_theme_profile_subtitle
data.value: Background, image, density, font, and bubble style

data.name: cm_attachments_gallery_subtitle
data.value: Local loaded history with type filters

data.name: cm_download_attachments_subtitle
data.value: Loaded history, filters, dedupe, sidecar JSON

data.name: cm_open_split_view_subtitle
data.value: Two chats side by side without a separate window

data.name: cm_jump_to_date_subtitle
data.value: Find the closest message without full backfill

data.name: cm_jump_to_date_dialog_text
data.value: Laney will find the closest message to the start of the selected day. If the date is not loaded, it uses a cheap history search instead of downloading the whole chat.

data.name: cm_download_filter_placeholder
data.value: name, extension, type, or URL; can be empty

data.name: cm_download_size_placeholder
data.value: max size MB; can be empty

data.name: cm_download_sidecar
data.value: Write sidecar JSON next to files

data.name: cm_download_resume
data.value: Resume: skip files already downloaded into this folder

data.name: cm_download_dialog_text
data.value: By default, Laney exports the locally loaded slice. Full-history runs through VK API with a resumable queue.

data.name: cm_local_reaction_subtitle
data.value: Local only, not sent to VK

data.name: cm_clean_copy_subtitle
data.value: New message; incompatible types will be skipped

data.name: cm_mute_sender_subtitle
data.value: No local notifications from this author in this chat

data.name: cm_shadowban_sender_subtitle
data.value: Hide this author's messages only in this chat

data.name: cm_quiet_clear_subtitle
data.value: Toast and sound will follow the usual rules again

data.name: cm_e2e_import_handshake_subtitle
data.value: Paste peer token and get the response

data.name: cm_e2e_import_backup_subtitle
data.value: Restore keys from encrypted backup token

data.name: cm_e2e_unverify_subtitle
data.value: If you no longer trust the fingerprint

data.name: cm_e2e_verify_subtitle
data.value: After checking SAS/fingerprint with the peer

data.name: cm_e2e_auto_encrypt_subtitle
data.value: Normal send becomes a Laney E2E payload

data.name: cm_e2e_rotate_keys_subtitle
data.value: Create a new handshake token and clear old verification

data.name: cm_e2e_export_backup_subtitle
data.value: Encrypted key transfer to your second client

data.name: session_dev_open_emoji_stickers_window
data.value: Open emoji/stickers panel in a separate window

data.name: session_dev_toast_body
data.value: Hurray for bunny Gex! He sure is a funny Gex!

data.name: privacy_not_available
data.value: Privacy settings are unavailable in this mode.

data.name: privacy_no_settings
data.value: VK returned no privacy settings for this account.

data.name: restart_required_ext
data.value: Restart the app to apply this setting

data.name: st_stickers_suggest_desc
data.value: Matching stickers will appear when you type certain words or emojis

data.name: st_stickers_animate_desc
data.value: Animated stickers will be played automatically

data.name: chat_creation_name_footnote
data.value: Enter a name and upload an optional photo

data.name: msg_delete_dialog_text_nom
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete {0} message?

data.name: msg_delete_dialog_text_gen
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete {0} messages?

data.name: msg_delete_dialog_text_plu
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete {0} messages?

data.name: message_spam_single
data.value: Message marked as spam and deleted.

data.name: message_spam_multi
data.value: Messages marked as spam and deleted.

data.name: chat_clear_modal_text
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete all messages in this chat? This can't be undone

data.name: chat_leave_modal_text
data.value: If you leave, you won't receive any new messages from this chat. You can only return if there is enough room.

data.name: group_management_desc
data.value: Add Laney to your groups to stay in touch with their members and receive notifications when new messages arrive.

data.name: drop_without_compression_desc
data.value: Drag and drop files here to attach them to the message

data.name: drop_photos_quick
data.value: Drag and drop photos here to attach them to the message

data.name: drop_photos_file
data.value: Drag and drop photos here to attach them as files (uncompressed)

data.name: drop_videos_quick
data.value: Drag and drop videos here to attach them to the message

data.name: drop_videos_file
data.value: Drag and drop videos here to attach them as files

data.name: writing_disabled_for_you
data.value: The chat administrator restricted you from messaging

data.name: writing_disabled_for_you_until
data.value: The chat administrator restricted you from messaging until {0}

data.name: writing_disabled_for_all
data.value: Only the administrator can write in this chat

data.name: writing_disabled_for_all_until
data.value: The chat administrator has restricted messaging until {0}

data.name: chatlink_invalidation_info
data.value: In order to make the invitation invalid, you can revoke the link by creating a new one.

data.name: chat_permission_key_invite
data.value: Who can invite members to the chat

data.name: chat_permission_key_change_pin
data.value: Who can change the pinned message

data.name: chat_permission_key_see_invite_link
data.value: Who can see the chat invite link

data.name: chat_permission_key_change_style
data.value: Who can change the chat theme

data.name: qr_signin_p1_desc
data.value: Scan the QR code with the VK app or your device's camera

data.name: qr_signin_p2_desc
data.value: Make sure that your device's data is shown on the screen and press Continue

data.name: offclient_auth_notice
data.value: Login will be done on behalf of the "VK Messenger" app

data.name: chat_editor_messages_forwarding_disabled_desc
data.value: Chat members won't be able to forward messages or save them

data.name: chat_editor_service_messages_desc
data.value: When members join, leave, get invited and kicked out
